description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant silver hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Referencing the classic school-bag buckle detailing, expand your bag collection with this accessory. Two tone dyed leatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing Buckle and rivet detailing on the front, back and sides Two handles Two main zippered compartments with nylon lining Zippered pocket inside the second main compartment Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
